metadata.description: QA automation skills for Connectbase ACE team — Karate test generation, coverage analysis, and Zephyr Scale review. Works across RemotePricing2 (RP2), RemotePricingAPI (RP1), and UAP.

plugins.name: qa-addquote
plugins.description: Add new quote test scenarios to the Karate integration test suite (RP1 and RP2)

plugins.name: qa-apimapadd
plugins.description: Generate Karate API mapping feature files from PSAM CSV files

plugins.name: qa-coverage-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze Jira ticket test coverage — requirements, code changes, Zephyr test cases, and Karate integration gaps

plugins.name: qa-zephyr-review
plugins.description: Review Zephyr Scale test cases for completeness, clarity, and RP2/RP1 standards

plugins.name: ace-runquote
plugins.description: Run a live one-off quote against any ACE platform provider (RP2, RP1, or UAP) and return the raw response
